info.name: FC Estimate Builder API (fc-builder-api)
info.description:
Standalone FC (Financial Counselor) Estimate Builder pipeline.

Rebuilds the finalized non-package FC Estimate Builder from the clean FC handoff database (local Postgres `fc_handoff`). Computes percentile-driven estimates from historical cohorts and generates the full 16-sheet interactive Excel workbook with parity to the finalized builders.

**Base URL**: `{{baseUrl}}` (default http://localhost:4100)

**Validated family**: `robotic_tkr_unilateral_right` — engine output matches the finalized workbook exactly (final estimate to the paisa). Also registered: `robotic_tkr_unilateral_left`, `robotic_tkr_bilateral`.

**AI**: intake / item-mapping / explanation run on Gemini via Vertex AI (service-account auth). AI proposes, the DB decides — canonical keys are never invented.

**Run order for a demo**: Health → Intake (free text) → Build Estimate → Download Workbook.

request.description: Liveness + DB connectivity. Returns `{ ok: true, db: "fc_handoff" }` when the Postgres pool answers.

item.name: Lookups
item.description: DB-grounded pickers for UI dropdowns and AI grounding. All read-only.

request.description: All 68 insurance organizations from `fc.organization_tariff_mapping` with their resolved tariff (`tariff_cd`/`tariff_name`). Use `organization_cd` in the estimate `payment` block for non-cash payors.
Search canonical service items (`fc.service_item_mapping`, 1,639 rows). Returns FC bucket, grouping, billing head, room-dependency. Max 50 rows.
Search canonical pharmacy items (`fc.pharmacy_item_mapping`, 8,578 rows) joined with MRP/sale-rate from the catalog reference. Max 50 rows.
Doctors present in `fc.consultation_tariff_rate_matrix` for the given tariff. Use `doctor_cd` in the estimate `clinical` block when consultation pricing is needed.

item.name: Estimate
item.description: The core pipeline: payor→tariff resolution, payer-basis auto-resolution (doc 14 thresholds), percentile drivers, line-item engine, totals.

request.description:
Full JSON estimate.

**Notes**
- `payor_bucket: Cash` → tariff TR1/KIMS automatically; for insurance send `payor_bucket` + `organization_cd` (from Organizations lookup). Unresolvable tariffs return warnings, never silent fallbacks.
- `controls` all optional — defaults shown. Driver bases: `P25|P50|P75|Manual` (+`*_manual` value). `robotic: auto` selects Yes when historical presence > 90%.
- `selections` toggles: add-ons by item_code, grouped residuals by grouping name, OT-consumables shortlist by item_code (`Include`/`Exclude`), implant override (`Default P50` | `Family Override` | `Brand Override` | `Exact Item Override` + family/brand/itemCode).
- Response: resolved_context (tariff, payer bases with resolver reason+confidence, robotic, OT slot), drivers (p25/p50/p75+selected), line_items[] (per-room Low/Typ/High cells), subtotal, grand_total, **final_estimate**, bucket_totals, add_ons, grouped_adjustments, advanced_controls (OT shortlist + implant hierarchy), service_line_count alert, warnings, unresolved_items.

For the default body above the final_estimate is **597612.0654575195** (matches the finalized workbook exactly).

Same body as Build estimate; returns the **16-sheet interactive Excel workbook** (`Content-Disposition: attachment`).

Sheets: Builder, Estimate Summary, Estimate vs IP FC Actuals, Advanced Controls, Service Add-Ons, Grouped Adjustments, Grouping Review, Implant Selection, Estimate Breakdown, Line Item Detail, Pharmacy Template, Service Template, Pharmacy Metrics, IP FC Actuals, Professional Fees Review, Reference.

Live formulas + dropdowns — changing Room/Mode/driver selections *inside Excel* recalculates the estimate. 99.77% cell parity with the finalized reference workbook (100% of formulas).

**Tip**: in Postman use "Send and Download" to save the file.

item.name: AI Assist (Gemini via Vertex)
item.description: AI proposes, DB decides. All three endpoints ground every AI output against the clean FC database.

request.description:
Converts a free-text FC intake note into the structured estimate input: `{ patient, clinical (procedure family), payment (payor bucket), notes }`.

If an insurer is mentioned, the name is matched against `fc.organization_tariff_mapping` and DB-grounded `organization_candidates` are returned (auto-resolved to `organization_cd` when exactly one matches). Feed the result straight into Build estimate.

item.name: Map items — fuzzy descriptions → canonical items

request.description: For each `{description, kind: service|pharmacy, context?}`: word-wise DB search proposes candidates, Gemini ranks and picks (`best_index`, confidence, reason). Returns `resolved` (canonical item or null), full `candidates`, and the AI verdict. Unmatched items come back as unresolved — never silently bucketed (doc 05 rule).

Builds the estimate (same body as Build estimate) then returns `{ final_estimate, bucket_totals, explanation }` — a <150-word INR-formatted plain-language summary for the counselling conversation. The model is instructed to never invent numbers not present in the computed data.
